recommendations.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A young girl sent to live with her father and his new girlfriend discovers creatures in her new home who want to claim her as one of their own.

recommendations.title: Ju-On: Black Ghost
recommendations.overview: The supernatural grudge manifests itself by way of a strange cyst growing in the body of a young woman, slowly draining all life from her in revenge for... what?

recommendations.title: I Lost My Body
recommendations.overview: A story of Naoufel, a young man who is in love with Gabrielle. In another part of town, a severed hand escapes from a dissection lab, determined to find its body again.

recommendations.title: Sketch
recommendations.overview: When a young girl’s sketchbook falls into a strange pond, her drawings come to life—chaotic, real, and on the loose. As the town descends into chaos, her family must reunite and stop the monsters they never meant to unleash.

recommendations.title: This Gun for Hire
recommendations.overview: Sadistic killer-for-hire Philip Raven becomes enraged when his latest job is paid off in marked bills. Vowing to track down his double-crossing boss, nightclub executive Gates, Raven sits beside Gates' lovely new employee, Ellen, on a train out of to

recommendations.title: Werewolf of London
recommendations.overview: A strange animal attack turns a botanist into a bloodthirsty monster.

recommendations.title: The City of the Dead
recommendations.overview: In Whitewood, Massachusetts, a presumed witch places a curse on the town before she is burned at the stake. 300 years later, a college student arrives and checks into the mysterious Raven's Inn to research the town's history with witchcraft.

recommendations.title: House at the End of the Street
recommendations.overview: A mother and daughter move to a new town and find themselves living next door to a house where a young girl murdered her parents. When the daughter befriends the surviving son, she learns the story is far from over.

recommendations.title: The Domestics
recommendations.overview: A young husband and wife must fight to return home in a post-apocalyptic mid-western landscape ravaged by gangs.

recommendations.title: Arabian Nights
recommendations.overview: The final part of Pasolini's Trilogy of Life series is rich with exotic tales of slaves and kings, potions, betrayals, demons and, most of all, love and lovemaking in all its myriad forms. Mysterious and liberating, this is an exquisitely dreamlike a
